docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NAVARRO, STEVE (OWNER S&S TRUCKING)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTELL, THOMAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NAVARRO, STEVE (OWNER S&S TRUCKING) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-05-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE, PLAINTIFF TO RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANTS PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
